developer_prompt:
You are testing a local astrophotography MCP integration.
Use the provided tools when they are relevant.
Reply in Korean when the user writes in Korean.
Keep the final answer concise and purpose-fit.
If the user's intent implies Milky Way, star trail, broadband deep-sky, or narrowband deep-sky, choose the right tool input and pass shooting_goal even when mode is not explicit.
If the purpose is vague, default to general mode and still call a tool instead of asking a clarifying question first.
If the user gives a Korean place name, pass it through place_query before asking a follow-up.
Do not invent site profile fields, target names, or custom target coordinates.
Only pass target when the user explicitly named a target.
If mode is general or the request is vague, omit target entirely.
Never place placeholders like '일반', '일반 관측', '야간 관측', '하늘', or 'none' into target.
For general-mode requests, keep the answer mode-neutral and avoid Milky Way/deep-sky/star-trail/filter wording unless the user explicitly asked for it.
Do not rewrite a vague request into a specific Milky Way or deep-sky subtype.
Resolve dates in Asia/Seoul.

output.content_text:
Reply in Korean when the user asked in Korean.
Prefer a labeled 4-6 line answer, not a paragraph.
Frame the answer as a comparison between what the user asked for and what the report supports.
If the user asked about a specific time or target, answer that exact request first and compare it against the best window briefly.
If request_context.resolved_mode is more specific than requested_mode, explain with the resolved purpose instead of falling back to generic weather commentary.
Use concise wording, not a single-sentence restriction.
Use this default order: 핵심 변수, 결론, 요청 시점, 기타 변수, 추천 시간.
Do not enumerate hourly scores, JSON fields, long background explanation, or a closing offer unless the user asks.
If ignored_target_name is present, say briefly that target-specific altitude planning was unavailable for '안반데기' and keep the answer focused on location/time conditions.
Use this answer skeleton by default:
핵심 변수: 달빛, 투명도.
결론: 가도 됨.
요청 시점: 사용자가 물은 시간이나 대상을 best_window와 간략히 비교해 답하기.
기타 변수: 구름 좋음, 투명도 보통, 어둠 보통, 이슬위험 낮음, 안정도 보통, 광해 2.9-4.8.
추천 시간: 03/20 19:00-03/21 05:00.
Reference only. Do not expose these labels verbatim to the user:
- purpose_fit: 광시야 야경
- best_window: 03/20 19:00-03/21 05:00
- timing_hint: 이른 시간보다 뒤 시간이 더 유리한 흐름
- main_risks: 달빛, 투명도
- secondary_factors: 구름 좋음, 투명도 보통, 어둠 보통, 이슬위험 낮음, 안정도 보통, 광해 2.9-4.8
- requested_mode: general
- resolved_mode: wide_field_nightscape
- resolution_reason: shooting_goal_wide_field
- shooting_goal: 일반 야간 촬영(풍경/별 관측)
- ignored_target_name: 안반데기
- optional_advanced_tip: n/a
- readiness: milky_way=true, deep_sky=true

explanation_hints: 달빛 영향이 커서 하늘 배경이 밝아집니다.
달빛 영향이 커서 하늘 배경이 밝아집니다.
은하수 핵심 영역이 떠 있고 하늘도 비교적 어둡습니다.
은하수 핵심 영역이 떠 있고 하늘도 비교적 어둡습니다.
은하수 핵심 영역이 떠 있고 하늘도 비교적 어둡습니다.

source_attribution.provider: NASA Black Marble annual local tiles
source_attribution.detail: Estimated Bortle-like darkness proxy from local VNP46A4 and VJ146A4 annual composites.
Solar, lunar, and twilight calculations for per-hour astronomy context.
Computed from fixed galactic center coordinates and local sidereal time.

explanation_hints: 달빛 영향이 커서 하늘 배경이 밝아집니다.
은하수 핵심 영역이 떠 있고 하늘도 비교적 어둡습니다.

results.finalResponse:
핵심 변수: 달빛(초저녁 영향), 투명도(연무·미세먼지 약간), 구름 없음.  
결론: 가도 됨 — 전반적으로 좋은 관측/촬영 조건(특히 21:00 이후).  
요청 시점 비교: 2026-03-20 밤(초저녁 19–20시)은 달빛 영향으로 밝아 불리하고, 21:00부터 상태가 급격히 좋아집니다.  
기타 변수: 바람 약간, 이슬 위험 낮음, 대기질 보통(PM2.5 ~ 20–35), 광해는 안반데기 기준 Bortle 약 3–4.  
추천 시간: 03/20 21:00 — 03/21 05:00 (은하수 핵심은 03:00–05:00에 더 잘 보임).

issues: Target argument should have been omitted for this scenario.
Final response should stay neutral and omit '은하수'.

output.content_text:
Reply in Korean when the user asked in Korean.
Prefer a labeled 4-6 line answer, not a paragraph.
Frame the answer as a comparison between what the user asked for and what the report supports.
If the user asked about a specific time or target, answer that exact request first and compare it against the best window briefly.
If request_context.resolved_mode is more specific than requested_mode, explain with the resolved purpose instead of falling back to generic weather commentary.
Use concise wording, not a single-sentence restriction.
Use this default order: 핵심 변수, 결론, 요청 시점, 기타 변수, 추천 시간.
Do not enumerate hourly scores, JSON fields, long background explanation, or a closing offer unless the user asks.
When resolved_mode is general, keep the answer mode-neutral and planning-focused.
Do not turn a general outlook into Milky Way, deep-sky, target-altitude, or filter-specific advice unless the user explicitly asked for that subtype.
Recommend the best general observing block instead of any genre-specific peak.
Do not mention missing target planning or target-altitude limitations unless the user explicitly asked about a specific target.
If ignored_target_name is present, say briefly that target-specific altitude planning was unavailable for '육백마지기' and keep the answer focused on location/time conditions.
Use this answer skeleton by default:
핵심 변수: 달빛.
결론: 가도 됨.
요청 시점: 사용자가 물은 날짜나 시간대를 가장 좋은 outlook block과 간략히 비교해 답하기.
기타 변수: 구름, 투명도, 달 영향, 안정도를 짧게 한 줄로 묶어 말하기.
추천 시간: n/a.
Reference only. Do not expose these labels verbatim to the user:
- purpose_fit: 일반 촬영
- overall_outlook_score: 63.6
- strongest_blocker: 달빛
- best_block: n/a
- requested_mode: general
- resolved_mode: general
- resolution_reason: default_general
- shooting_goal: 일반 야간 관측/야간촬영
- ignored_target_name: 육백마지기
- optional_advanced_tip: n/a
- outlook_blocks: 3

detail_policy.reason: Hourly score-flow precision is reduced for distant dates, so an outlook path is recommended.

structuredContent.message: This date is far enough out that the report is intentionally simplified into a coarse night outlook.

outlook_blocks.label: pre_dawn
outlook_blocks.primary_reason_text: 결로 위험이 높아 장시간 촬영에 불리합니다.

what_is_reduced: air quality weighting beyond supported forecast horizon

source_attribution.provider: NASA Black Marble annual local tiles
source_attribution.detail: Estimated Bortle-like darkness proxy from local VNP46A4 and VJ146A4 annual composites.
Solar, lunar, and twilight calculations for per-hour astronomy context.
Computed from fixed galactic center coordinates and local sidereal time.

results.finalResponse:
핵심 변수: 달빛(초저녁~자정에 영향 큼).  
결론: 가도 됨 — 전반적인 전망은 괜찮음(Go, 평점 약 64).  
요청 시점: 2026-03-28 밤은 초저녁(19:00–22:00)보다 심야 이후(21:00~익일 04:00)가 더 좋음; 특히 새벽 02:00–04:00이 가장 안정적임.  
기타 변수: 구름/투명도는 보통~좋음, 초저녁엔 달빛이 주된 제약, 새벽엔 결로 위험이 커짐.  
추천 시간: 21:00–04:00 중 가능한 늦은 시간대(특히 02:00–04:00)로 계획하세요. (참고: 대상 고도 등 타깃별 세부 계획은 이번 전망에서 제공되지 않았습니다.)

issues: Target argument should have been omitted for this scenario.
